![Sastre Consulting Ltd logo](https://contactout.com/images/ico-company-no-logo.svg) # Sastre Consulting Ltd **Get verified emails for Sastre Consulting Ltd employees**![arrow](https://contactout.com/images/ico-arrow-narrow-right.svg) - [Profile](https://contactout.com/company/Sastre-Consulting-Ltd-1365) - [Email Format](https://contactout.com/company/Sastre-Consulting-Ltd-email-format-1365) ## About Sastre Consulting Ltd SASTRE is a political risk, business intelligence and corporate investigations consultancy. We work with a new generation of political and business intelligence professionals, uniting real local knowledge with top-of-the-market experience. We provide the expertise to navigate complicated business environments. We offer in-depth country and sectoral expertise, rigorous analysis and strategic foresight to help guide investment decisions. see more | | | | --- | --- | | ![website icon](https://contactout.com/images/ico-link-01.svg)
